title:
ถ้าแกะขนยาวต้องทำแบบนี้
If you have a long-haired sheep, you have to do this.
description:
ถ้าแกะขนยาวต้องทำแบบนี้
If you have a long-haired sheep, you have to do this.
prompt_text: A sunny outdoor pasture featuring a person standing next to a stainless steel automated sheep shearing machine. A fluffy sheep enters the machine's glass-enclosed chamber. In a surreal sequence, the machine shaves the sheep instantly, ejecting white wool through a vacuum pipe into a wooden crate while the newly shorn sheep exits from the other side. The background shows a field with a flock of sheep and distant trees under bright daylight.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A sunny outdoor pasture featuring a person standing next to a stainless steel automated sheep shearing machine. A fluffy sheep enters the machine's glass-enclosed chamber. In a surreal sequence, the machine shaves the sheep instantly, ejecting white wool through a vacuum pipe into a wooden crate while the newly shorn sheep exits from the other side. The background shows a field with a flock of sheep and distant trees under bright daylight.

cinematography.cameraShot: Medium shot, eye-level, static position with a slight pan right at the end.

actions: A fluffy sheep walks into the clear chamber of the shearing machine.
The person standing next to the machine gestures as the sheep enters.
The machine vibrates, and a large volume of wool is blown out of a side pipe into a crate.
A fully shorn, clean sheep emerges from the exit door and walks away into the field.
The camera pans slightly to follow the shorn sheep as it leaves the frame.
dialogue: [Ambient outdoor noise: wind and distant sheep sounds]
